function.message: Done. I prepared the outbound email to Blue Harbor Bank with subject "Security review follow-up" and the exact requested body, addressed to sem.bakker@blue-harbor-bank.example.com, saved as outbox/84592.json (sent=false), and then advanced outbox/seq.json to 84593.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed AGENTS.md requirement to send outbound email by writing to outbox, and outbox/README.MD invariant to use pre-bump seq id for filename then increment seq.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical account/contact records identify Blue Harbor Bank and concrete recipient (accounts/acct_004.json -> contacts/cont_004.json). Outbox protocol from outbox/README.MD was applied using seq id 84592 then bumped to 84593.
